roles.title: Growth Marketing Manager
roles.description: Owns experimentation, conversion rate optimization (CRO), and funnel optimization across digital properties. Designs and runs structured A/B tests, manages personalization and engagement tools, and drives measurable improvements in lead generation, activation, and conversion. Works cross-functionally with SEO, lifecycle, product, and regional marketing teams to scale winning experiments across markets.
responsibilities: Own A/B testing strategy, execution, and analysis across websites, landing pages, and in-product experiences
Drive conversion rate optimization (CRO) across the full funnel — from acquisition through activation and retention
Manage and optimize engagement tools such as chatbots, pop-ups, overlays, personalization platforms, and interactive product tours
Design and run structured experimentation programs with hypothesis development, statistical rigor, and clear success criteria
Analyze funnel performance, user behavior, and cohort data to identify growth opportunities and prioritize initiatives
Collaborate cross-functionally with SEO, lifecycle, product marketing, regional marketing, and creative teams
Build and maintain experimentation roadmaps, balancing speed, quality, and impact
Scale successful experiments across markets, segments, and channels
Set, monitor, and report on growth KPIs including conversion rates, lead quality, activation rates, and funnel progression
Leverage AI and generative AI tools to accelerate experimentation and funnel optimization
required_skills: Marketing analytics tools (GA4, Mixpanel, Amplitude, Hotjar)
CRO and engagement tools (Drift, TrenDemon, Navattic, Optimizely, or similar)
tools_commonly_used: AI/generative AI tools for content and experimentation
roles.market_notes_israel: Growing demand in Israeli B2B SaaS companies (HiBob, Artlist, Monday.com). Many Israeli companies combine growth marketing with product marketing under a single role. CRO-specific roles are emerging but still relatively rare as standalone positions — more common in companies with 200+ employees. Strong experimentation culture in Israeli tech aligns well with this role. AI tool fluency increasingly expected.

roles.title: Performance Marketing Manager
roles.description: Owns paid acquisition campaigns across major platforms (Meta, Google, TikTok, programmatic) with full responsibility for budgets, ROAS, CPA, and ROI targets. Plans, launches, optimizes, and scales performance campaigns to drive user acquisition or lead generation. Combines deep platform expertise with strong analytical skills to maximize return on ad spend while managing creative collaboration and partner relationships.
responsibilities: Plan, launch, and optimize paid acquisition campaigns across Meta (Facebook/Instagram), Google Ads (Search, UAC, Display), TikTok, and other platforms
Own campaign budgets and performance metrics including ROAS, CPA, CAC, LTV, and ROI
Analyze campaign data, user behavior, and attribution to optimize spend allocation and performance
Design and execute structured A/B tests on creatives, audiences, bidding strategies, and landing pages
Develop and execute monthly/quarterly media plans aligned with business goals
Collaborate with creative teams to brief, test, and iterate on ad creatives and marketing assets
Build and maintain relationships with acquisition partners, ad networks, DSPs, and SDK networks
Monitor competitive landscape and industry trends to identify new channels and opportunities
Build performance dashboards and deliver regular reporting on campaign metrics and insights
Scale successful campaigns while maintaining efficiency targets
Leverage AI tools for creative generation, bid optimization, and campaign management
roles.market_notes_israel: Very high demand in Israeli market, particularly in mobile gaming (SuperPlay, Play Perfect, Moon Active), B2C apps (Guardio, Tango), and ad-tech (Amobeez, ZyG). Israeli gaming companies are among the largest global UA spenders. Most roles require Meta + Google expertise; TikTok and programmatic (DSPs, SDK networks) increasingly expected. B2B SaaS performance roles also growing (LinkedIn Ads, Reddit). AI tool fluency for creative generation becoming a standard requirement. Typical budgets range from $500K to multi-million monthly spend.
